questions: Which host/model signals exist in a live Claude Code session?
Why does the current chain record unknown?

findings.summary: live enumeration: CLAUDECODE=1 + CLAUDE_CODE_* present; CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR and any model identifier ABSENT; the session's own manifests all warned host-unknown
detect_host consults only CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR (qor_platform.py:33); _detect_host reads only the cached marker (ai_provenance.py:61)
fix: signal-family ladder + fresh-detection fallback; model half defers (no honest source; QOR_MODEL_FAMILY stays explicit)
